Welcome!

Your account is ready. Now connect Claude Code in one command.

terminalPaste and run this command once
$claude mcp add --transport http alashed-tracker https://mcp.tracker.alashed.kz
1

Open your terminal

Any terminal, any directory — it works globally

2

Paste and run the command above

Claude will ask you to sign in via browser — just click Allow

3

Open Claude Code and ask away

"What tasks do I have today?" or "Create a high-priority bug report"

Go to dashboard →Claude Code docs ↗
